# docs(specs): add kaizen-observability.md + diagnostics-catalog entry

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `753a3c322474` — docs(specs): add kaizen-observability.md + diagnostics-catalog entry

**Body**:

New spec kaizen-observability.md documents:
  * TraceExporter contract (single-filter-point sink with cross-SDK
    fingerprint stamping; JsonlSink / NoOpSink / CallableSink; no
    vendor-SDK coupling per rules/independence.md)
  * AgentDiagnostics Protocol conformance (Diagnostic isinstance,
    context-manager semantics, rollup shape)
  * BaseAgent hot-path wiring (attach_trace_exporter, AgentLoop
    start/end emission, fire-and-forget error discipline)
  * Cross-SDK fingerprint canonicalization contract (locked byte-
    identical with kailash-rs#468 / v3.17.1+ commit e29d0bad)
  * Tenant isolation + classification (payload_hash sha256:<8-hex>
    per rules/event-payload-classification.md §2)
  * Security threats (prompt-injection-via-trace, classified-PK leak,
    secrets in trace fields, vendor-SDK coupling, timing side-channel,
    mass-fingerprint DoS, schema-name log bleed)
  * Tier 1 + Tier 2 test contracts

New spec diagnostics-catalog.md indexes every Diagnostic adapter with
its Tier 2 wiring-test file name (grep-able per facade-manager-
detection.md §2) and the medical-metaphor regression gate.

_index.md updated with the kaizen-observability entry.

Sibling-spec sweep (rules/specs-authority.md §5b):
  * grep for TraceEvent / observability / AgentDiagnostics across all
    specs/kaizen-*.md found only the pre-existing forward reference
    in kaizen-interpretability.md:38 (PR#4 correctly anticipates
    PR#6) — no drift to patch.

PR#6 of issue #567.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
